reason_for_decision: The article now clears the pass threshold with stronger revisit-rate framing, better lifecycle trade-off coverage, and improved system-level reasoning.
strengths: The comparison now explains why revisit behavior matters more than the technology label alone.
Lifecycle and integration trade-offs are stated more honestly than in a basic upgrade narrative.
The article makes it clear when mechanical scan remains rational instead of treating it as obsolete by default.
summary_assessment: This version is publishable under the stricter rubric. It offers a more defensible architectural comparison and avoids the usual newer-versus-older simplification.
